text:
"Fullmetal Alchemist" may refer to the following:
Edward Elric, the protagonist of the franchise whose title as a State Alchemist is "Fullmetal".
Alphonse Elric, Edward's younger brother who is frequently mistaken as and incorrectly called the Fullmetal Alchemist.
The Fullmetal Alchemist franchise as a whole.
Fullmetal Alchemist, the original manga series by Hiromu Arakawa.
The twenty-fourth chapter of the manga, entitled "Fullmetal Alchemist".
Fullmetal Alchemist, the first anime adaptation from 2003.
Fullmetal Alchemist the Movie: Conqueror of Shamballa, the film which concluded the first anime series.
Fullmetal Alchemist, the second anime adaptation from 2009 which was retitled Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood internationally.
Fullmetal Alchemist, the first episode of the second anime series.
Fullmetal Alchemist: The Sacred Star of Milos, the movie based on the Brotherhood anime.
Any of the Fullmetal Alchemist video games.
Fullmetal Alchemist, the 2017 live-action film adaptation of the original manga.
